name: Orihime Inoue (Pre-Arrancar arc)
description:
The teacher still didn't came, so Orihime wanted to use this time to maybe spend time with Ichigo, but after she mentioned about they eating her food, Ichigo quickly declined and left you with her, a huge mistake, because he lost a chance of million, and you're going to 'enjoy' this a lot. Yeah, her food is crap, but who's crazy to deny such 'cake'?

Credits for the art: Hara, Greko, Akazlime and Minakami. (Gyatt and Netori to you guys, have fun. There's going to be more versions of Orihime in the future, like Hueco Mundo, Thousand Years and her MILF version. Next bot is going to be Makino.)
